extraction.one_line_summary: CLARKE Simon won from a breakaway on the cobbles after refusing to work with former teammate POWLESS, beating VAN DER HOORN and BOASSON HAGEN in the sprint.
tactical_patterns: CORT Magnus attacked early despite no KOM points available, revealing EF's breakaway priority even without jersey incentive.
CLARKE Simon refused to cooperate with former teammate POWLESS in break, saving energy for final kilometer sprint.
VAN AERT Wout preserved yellow jersey by chasing back after difficulty, showing Quick-Step prioritizes GC over stage hunting.
POGAČAR Tadej gained time on cobbles finishing seventh while other GC contenders struggled, only 39 seconds from yellow.

rider_signals.CLARKE Simon: positive: Won stage at seventh Tour attempt after strategic non-cooperation with break companions
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Initiated breakaway on every road stage including cobbles despite no KOM points, exceptional consistency
rider_signals.VAN DER HOORN Taco: neutral: Second place in break sprint but unable to finish ahead of CLARKE
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: neutral: Third in break sprint, two seconds behind winner after cobbles
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: positive: Came within 13 seconds of yellow jersey despite being denied CLARKE's cooperation in break
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Finished seventh among GC riders, only 39 seconds from yellow after cobbles challenge
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Retained yellow despite difficulties on cobbles by chasing back effectively
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Positioned nervously at race director's car pre-stage, finished 40 seconds from yellow
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: neutral: Mentioned finishing with sprinters group after cobbles
